use_cases: Navigation arrows for carousels or image galleries with expanding hover effects
Prev/next controls in media players or slideshows with smooth shape transitions
Interactive directional buttons for page navigation with morphing animations
Call-to-action buttons with sliding arrow and line reveal on hover
ai_summary: A morphing arrow button component featuring smooth framer-motion animations that transition the button shape from circular to pill-shaped on hover, revealing a sliding line and arrow indicator. Supports left and right directions with dark mode compatibility, commonly used for navigation controls in carousels, galleries, and media players.
